chapter_title: Issuance of Licenses, Expiration, and Renewal
text: A licensee shall display his driver’s license upon request of a magistrate or judge before whom he may be brought for violation of any traffic law.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6. DRIVERS' LICENSES [12500 - 15326]
### Chapter 1. Issuance of Licenses, Expiration, and Renewal [12500 - 13020]
#### Article 4. Signature and Display of Licenses [12950 - 12953]
##### § 12952

A licensee shall display his driver’s license upon request of a magistrate or judge before whom he may be brought for violation of any traffic law.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: A licensee shall display his driver’s license upon request of a magistrate or judge before whom he may be brought for violation of any traffic law.
